channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Fox pips Young to major glory at The Open after final-hole thriller
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Ryan Fox claimed a maiden major title after a final-hole birdie snatched a dramatic one-shot victory over Cameron Young at The 154th Open.

item.title: Peller Reveals ₦700,000 Wedding Aso Ebi, Says 400 Guests Expected
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: TikTok sensation Habeeb Hamzat, popularly known as Peller, has revealed that the eight-yard fabric for his forthcoming wedding aso ebi is priced at ₦700,000, with about 400 guests expected to purchase and wear it for the ceremony. Peller made the disclosure in videos posted on Instagram on Saturday

item.title: Rita Dominic Shares Stunning Photos From Surprise Birthday Party
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress and finest onscreen goodness, Rita Dominic, has shared stunning photos and videos from her 51st surprise birthday party. Sunday Telegraph had earlier reported that the actress celebrated her 51st birthday on Sunday, July 12, expressing gratitude to her Maker for another yea

item.title: Tinubu has done more for Kaduna than any president in Nigeria’s history — Speaker Abbas
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Speaker of the 10th House of Representatives, Hon. Abbas Tajudeen, says President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has done for Kaduna State what The post Tinubu has done more for Kaduna than any president in Nigeria’s history — Speaker Abbas appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Niniola Opens Up Two Months After Husband’s Death
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Afrobeats singer Niniola has shared an emotional message marking two months since the death of her husband, business manager and best friend, Michael, describing the period as one of the most difficult chapters of her life. In a heartfelt post shared on her X page, the singer said she had initially

item.title: Navy sustains operational control over illegal refining hotspots
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Folorunsho, in the report, recalled that on July 10, personnel of Nigerian Navy Ship (NNS) PATHFINDER discovered and deactivated illegal refining sites within the Egbema axis of Ogba-Egbema-Ndoni Local Government Area. The post Navy sustains operational control over illegal refining hotspots appeare

item.title: World Cup Final: Drake stakes ₦2.3bn on Argentina as ‘curse’ resurfaces
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The five-time Grammy winner, whose real name is Aubrey Drake Graham, revealed the high-stakes bet by sharing a screenshot of his betting slip on Instagram.

item.title: MOVIE REVIEW: Can Nollywood revive its classics? The Return of Omotara Johnson tries
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Bukky Wright returns in this sequel, which balances nostalgia with strong performances, though it struggles to match the original's emotional power. The post MOVIE REVIEW: Can Nollywood revive its classics? The Return of Omotara Johnson tries appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Trump presence means two-hour queues for World Cup final
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Supporters faced long queues to get into New York New Jersey Stadium amid heightened security for the 2026 World Cup final.

item.title: Peter Obi reflects on service at 65, donates ₦10m to rural hospital
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Vincent Ujumadu AWKA — Former Anambra State Governor and presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), Mr Peter Obi, has marked his 65th birthday with a message of gratitude to God, reflection on his journey and a renewed commitment to service to humanity. Obi, in a statement i

item.title: Security operatives launch rescue mission for abducted victim in Benue
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Security operatives have launched a rescue operation for one of three siblings abducted by gunmen in Benue State while transporting their mother’s corpse from Abuja for burial. The kidnappers released two of the siblings on Saturday night and abandoned the corpse of their late mother, whil

item.title: FULL LIST: Winners of 2026 NBA elections
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The winners of the 2026 Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) national elections have been announced after voting ended and results were released on Sunday.

item.title: Adamawa ADC Passes Vote Of Confidence On Omar Suleiman
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Adamawa State chapter of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) has passed a vote of confidence in its governorship candidate, Engineer Omar Suleiman. The vote of confidence was announced by the party Caretaker Chairman, Abubakar Audu, who spoke on behalf of the twenty one Local Government Area c

item.title: I will be president for every NBA member — Badejo-Okusanya
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: ABUJA — President-elect of the Nigerian Bar Association (NBA), Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya, has pledged to lead an inclusive administration that caters for the interests of all members of the association, saying her victory represents a collective achievement for lawyers committed to building a stro

item.title: New NBA President Pledges Better Welfare, Inclusive Leadership For Lawyers
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The newly – elected President of the Nigerian Bar Association (NBA), Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya, has pledged to build an association where every lawyer has the opportunity to “earn better, live better and practise better.” Badejo-Okusanya made the commitment in a message posted on

item.title: 'My heart really sank' - Hamilton relieved mechanic unhurt after hit
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton says his "heart really sank" when his Ferrari car hit a mechanic in a pit stop in an incident that saw the team fined heavily by Belgian Grand Prix stewards.

item.title: Bauchi Govt Denies Selling Lame Forest Reserve, Says N50m Claim Misleading
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Bauchi State Ministry of Culture and Tourism has dismissed allegations that the Lame Burra Forest Reserve was sold for ₦50 million, describing the claim as false and legally impossible. In a statement issued by the Ministry’s Information and Public Relations Officer, Attahir B. Ahmad, the

item.title: Full list: Badejo-Okusanya, others emerge winners in 2026 NBA elections
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The full list of winners in the 2026 Nigerian Bar Association, NBA, national elections has been released following the conclusion of voting and the announcement of results by the Electoral Committee of the Nigerian Bar Association, ECNBA, on Sunday The post Full list: Badejo-Okusanya, others emerge

item.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

item.title: CBM Appoints Ajimati North Central Coordinator For Policy, Strategy, ICT Ahead Of 2027
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The City Boy Movement (CBM) – PBAT 2027 has appointed a Kwara State-based engineer and political strategist, Engr. Sola Ajimati, as its North Central Zonal Coordinator for Policy, Strategy, ICT and Implementation, as the pro-Tinubu support group intensifies preparations for the 2027 general election

item.title: Shooting Stars: NPFL club reports agent to FIFA after declaring midfielder AWOL
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) club Shooting Stars have announced that winger Ismail Ayodele is absent without leave (AWOL) after failing to report for pre-season duties, Soccernet.ng reports. ​Shooting Stars enjoyed a successful 2025/26 campaign in the Nigerian top flight, finishing third t

item.title: How PHEDRA Is Building His Music Career on His Own Terms
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: PHEDRA has spoken about creating music for listeners going through difficult seasons, particularly young people searching for encouragement without pretending life's challenges do not exist. That intention gives many of his songs an emotional focus that extends beyond catchy melodies.

item.title: ISWAP commander Abu Hassan reportedly killed in failed Borno attack
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A senior commander of the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP), identified as Abu Hassan, has reportedly been killed during a failed attack on Cross Kauwa in Borno State. The development was disclosed in a post shared on X on Sunday by security analyst Zagazola Makama, who cited inte

item.title: Donald Trump makes World Cup final prediction between Argentina and Spain
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “I hate to get involved, even though politically it doesn’t matter so much. I would say that it is hard to bet against Messi.”

item.title: Five Online Poker Games Every Player Should Try
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Online poker has evolved far beyond the traditional games that first introduced millions of players to the card table. Today, poker sites offer an impressive variety of formats, each bringing its own blend of strategy, excitement and decision-making. Whether you enjoy carefully analysing every hand

item.title: Ooni Of Ife Loses Elder Brother, Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The death of Prince Adetunji was announced on Sunday in a statement by the Ooni of Ife Leadership Colloquium, which paid tribute to his life and contributions to business and society. “It is with profound sadness that we received news of Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi’s passing, leaving family

item.title: 2027: Anglican Bishop Urges Politicians To Shun Vote Buying
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Bishop of Akoko-Edo Diocese of the Church of Nigeria, Global Anglican Communion, Rt. Rev. Ebenezer Saiki, has urged politicians, political parties and their candidates to uphold democratic values ahead of the 2027 general elections by allowing Nigerians to vote according to their convictions rat

item.title: Oyinkansola Badejo-Okunsanya: List of winners of 2026 NBA elections
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The results published on the ECNBA portal and confirmed by Ejelam showed that 26,184 lawyers voted out of the association's 82,172 registered voters, giving a voter turnout of 31.86 per cent. Below is the full list of winners in the 2026 NBA national elections: The post Oyinkansola Badejo-Okunsanya:

item.title: Premier College Nagarta College Revives Speech, Prize-Giving Day In Sokoto
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nagarta College, Sokoto, has held its maiden Speech and Prize-Giving Day ceremony in over three decades,marking a significant milestone in the history of the institution. The event, held in 2026, also featured the launch of the maiden edition of the Nagarta Magazine. The Premier College in Northern

item.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: I would never go so far as to say there's no place for AI in music (I'm a fan of Holly Herndon, after all). But I generally find music made with generative AI to be offensively boring, especially the outputs of Suno. So I'm having a bit of a tough time processing the fact that […]

item.title: NRS raises pressure on large taxpayers over digital invoice compliance
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "NRS has already commenced compliance monitoring activities in order to assess the level of adherence to the e-invoicing mandate among large taxpayers," the statement said.

item.title: “Grace Looks Good on Me”: Kate Henshaw Reflects On Life As She Marks 55th Birthday
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Kate Henshaw is celebrating her 55th birthday with a heartfelt message of gratitude, resilience and self-reflection, describing grace as the defining theme of her life’s journey. Taking to social media to commemorate the milestone, Henshaw reflected on the experiences

item.description: By Obas Esiedesa, Abuja The Independent Petroleum Marketers Association of Nigeria (IPMAN) has raised concerns over the recent increase in petroleum product import licences, warning that the development could worsen price instability, increase pressure on the naira and push petrol prices higher. item.title: One fight with me will revive Terry G’s career — Portable
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “If Terry G fights me one-on-one in boxing, I swear to God he will rise again. People will remember him again.”

item.title: Drake places N2bn bet on Argentina to beat Spain in World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Canadian rapper Drake has placed a $1.5 million (about N2.3 billion) bet on Argentina to defeat Spain in Sunday's 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The post Drake places N2bn bet on Argentina to beat Spain in World Cup final appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.description: More than 20 people were injured and 300 have been displaced by Saturday’s quake, while the total number of missing is still unknown A 5.5-magnitude earthquake shook the Andes region of Peru, killing at least five people, authorities said Sunday. item.title: Ministry, NIMC Partner To Deepen Technology-Driven Governance
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Minister Solid Minerals Development Dele Alake identified technology, statistics, data gathering and digital identity as critical enablers for evidence-based policymaking. The post Ministry, NIMC Partner To Deepen Technology-Driven Governance appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Transfer: Konyaspor hold talks with Awaziem over summer move
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Turkish Super Lig club Konyaspor have held talks with Nigerian defender Chidozie Awaziem, DAILY POST reports. Awaziem is expected to leave French club Nantes this summer following the Canaries relegation last season. According to Turkish news outlet, Spor Depor, Konyaspor are keen to secure the serv

item.title: SERAP to Akpabio, Abbas: Withdraw social media shutdown bill or face legal action
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: SERAP warned that the proposal would give the Federal Government sweeping powers to exclude platforms from The post SERAP to Akpabio, Abbas: Withdraw social media shutdown bill or face legal action appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: You helped sharpen democracy — Omokri’s birthday tribute to Peter Obi
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Nigeria’s Ambassador-designate to Mexico, Reno Omokri, has congratulated the presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), Peter Obi, on his 65th birthday.

item.title: Reports claim US military conducted large-scale medical evacuation from Jordan following Iranian attacks
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: New intelligence claims circulating in regional media allege that US forces in the Middle East have suffered significant battlefield casualties, read more Reports claim US military conducted large-scale medical evacuation from Jordan following Iranian attacks

item.title: Arsenal Linked With Shock Move For Former Man City Star
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Arsenal are considering John Stones as a short-term freebie fix if William Saliba’s injury proves to be serious. Saliba’s suspected back issue is yet to be assessed by the Gunners but there are fears he could be out for up to five months. The 25-year-old was forced off with the long-standing problem

item.title: Our Resolve To Send Joel-Onowakpo To Senate Paying Off – IDU President
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: President of the Isoko Development Union (IDU) Worldwide, Professor Chris Akpotu, has said the decision of the Isoko people to elect Senator Joel-Onowakpo Thomas to represent Delta South Senatorial District is already yielding significant dividends, citing President Bola Ahmed Tinubu’s assent

item.title: Full List: Countries that have won back-to-back World Cups
item.dc:creator: Vanguard Sports
item.description: Winning the FIFA World Cup is the ultimate achievement in football. Defending that title, however, has proven even more difficult. The post Full List: Countries that have won back-to-back World Cups appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Group calls for due process ahead of Abia polls
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: A political pressure group, the Abia Solidarity Forum, has called on anti-corruption and security agencies to remain impartial and uphold due process as political activities gather momentum in Abia State. The post Group calls for due process ahead of Abia polls appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Swollen River Sweeps Away Two in Kaduna Community
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Two youths have gone missing after they were swept away by a swollen river in Hayin Malam Bello community, Igabi Local Government Area of Kaduna State, following a heavy downpour on Saturday evening. The incident occurred as the victims attempted to cross the river on their way home from Kabala West

item.title: Ooni of Ife, Oba Ogunwusi loses elder brother, Prince Adetunji
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Ooni of Ife, Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi, Ojaja II, has lost his immediate elder brother, Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi. The monarch made the announcement in a statement through the Director of Media and Public Affairs, Ooni’s Palace, Sodiq Lawal, on Sunday, describing the elder brother as a distinguished e

item.title: Syria’s Al-Sharaa reshuffles security and intelligence leadership
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Government says the shake-up will strengthen security and clear the way for reconstruction.

item.title: Mary Habila: Senator Katung mourns, calls for thorough investigation
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Senator Sunday Marshall Katung, representing Kaduna South Senatorial District, has expressed deep sorrow over the death of Nurse Mary Habila, describing the incident as a tragic loss that has thrown her family and the wider community into mourning. The post Mary Habila: Senator Katung mourns, calls
